name: Kun Wang
summary: I use this space to share my research interests, publications, software projects, teaching, and academic updates.

research.title: Research Direction
research.description: Replace this text with your main academic direction: the phenomena, problems, systems, or theories you study.

research.title: Methods And Tools
research.description: Describe the methods you use, such as modeling, experiments, data analysis, fieldwork, software engineering, or computational workflows.

research.title: Current Questions
research.description: List the questions you are currently exploring and the kinds of collaborators or discussions you are open to.

publications.title: Add your first selected publication
publications.description: One sentence about the contribution and why it matters.

projects.title: Research Project
projects.description: A concise description of the project, research question, and current status.

projects.title: Software Tool
projects.description: Add a tool, package, dataset, or reproducible workflow that you want visitors to find quickly.

projects.title: Academic Notes
projects.description: Use this slot for lecture notes, reading lists, tutorials, or short research explainers.

teaching.title: Course, talk, workshop, or academic service
teaching.description: Add teaching assistantships, guest lectures, invited talks, conference service, or community roles.

cv.summary: Upload your current CV as assets/cv.pdf, then change the link below to assets/cv.pdf.

contactNote: For academic collaboration, research discussion, or project inquiries.
